S.FORM: zik qmisan lga mhabung abaw la. zik qmisan lga musa pkusan Luke's khmya.
S.PHON: zik qmis~ɕan lɣa mħaβuŋ aβaw la. zik qmis~ɕan lɣa mus~ɕa pkus~ɕan lukeʔs~ɕ kħmja.
S.FORM: zik qmisan lga mhabung abaw la. zik qmisan lga musa pkusan Luke's khmya.
S.PHON: zik qmis~ɕan lɣa mħaβuŋ aβaw la. zik qmis~ɕan lɣa mus~ɕa pkus~ɕan lukeʔs~ɕ kħmja.
